calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: arc_062 GAP-B committed-class-entropy behavioural falsifier (MECH-309/ARC-062) ported onto the CRF-gate calibration amend (crf-availability-maintenance at the CRF locus, ungated from GAP-A); supersedes 654d
items.note: The 654d-routed GAP-B re-queue on the CRF-gate calibration amend (landed ree-v3 main 42895f6, 2026-06-17). VERIFY-FIRST finding (user-confirmed): 569i's top-k GAP-A substrate DOES de-collapse the consumed_summary spread (0.073/0.089/0.084 > 0.05 floor, 3/3), but failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-654d_2026-06-16 proved GAP-A de-collapse is the WRONG lever -- 654d armed an equivalent de-collapse and crf_frac_active stayed EXACTLY 0.0 on all 3 ARM_ON seeds (even where consumed_summary cleared the floor) because the real GAP-B blocker is the CRF conflict-gate lockout (7-8 rules co-match -> theta(7)=0.15+0.25*6=1.65 >> maintenance_floor 0.45 -> every matched rule gated out), INDEPENDENT of GAP-A (different vectors/loci: consumed_summary=cross-candidate E3 channel, n_matched=cross-rule CRF context-match). FIX: three no-op-default CRF-gate levers landed at the CRF locus -- crf_mature_context_match_threshold=0.7 (FAULT 1: sharpen gate match cutoff -> n_matched ~2-3) + crf_tolerance_conflict_cap=3 (FAULT 2a: theta<=0.90<1.0) + crf_maintenance_couple_to_theta=True (FAULT 2b: floor maintained avail to max(floor, theta+eps) so the maintained differentiated pool clears the gate). ree-v3 contracts C20-C24 + activation smoke confirm the 654d inversion (crowded maintained pool frac_active 0.000 legacy -> 0.98 armed). CLONE-AND-MODIFY of 654d (minimal diff): same 2-arm ARM_OFF/ARM_ON design, only swept var=use_candidate_rule_field; the matched ARM_STD_G2 GAP-A constant is RETAINED on both arms (de-collapses E3 channel + gives C2 authority gain); same crf_persist + mature_pool_dynamics + availability_maintenance + context_from_e2_world_forward + trained-bias-head P1 REINFORCE arm (GAP-D) + SD-056 + 649/643a/SP-CEM/MECH-341 stack; ARM_ON additionally arms the three CRF-gate levers (inert in ARM_OFF, no field built). PRIMARY DV = COMMITTED-CLASS entropy. C1c crf_frac_active>=0.30 self-routing precondition RETAINED (now EXPECTED to clear; if still <0.30 -> substrate_not_ready_requeue, NEVER a false weakens). Three-branch routing, NO weakens: PASS (committed-class entropy lift ARM_ON>ARM_OFF on >=2/3 seeds) -> supports MECH-309/ARC-062; C1-fail -> substrate_not_ready_requeue; C1-holds/C2-fail -> shared CONVERSION ceiling -> non_contributory + /implement-substrate or /claim-synthesis. Records crf_n_matched_last + crf_frac_active + crf_last_theta (the 654d-autopsy discriminators) so the manifest shows the gate firing (n_matched ~2-3, theta<1.0, frac_active>=0.30). validate_experiments --strict OK; dry-run smoke PASS (both arms end-to-end, correctly self-routes substrate_not_ready at toy scale by design -- field cannot mature in 2 ep). MECH-309/ARC-062/ARC-063 stay candidate/substrate_ceiling/v3_pending; no claims.yaml edits. Do NOT start the runner (cloud auto-claims). Budget 2 arms x 3 seeds x 350 ep x 200 steps.

items.title: Q-045 / MECH-313 / MECH-260 4-arm tonic-noise / exploration-floor ablation (both-OFF / 313-only / 260-only / both-ON) on the now-survival-competent scaffolded_sd054_onboarding substrate; ARC-062 gated-policy on all arms
items.note: The registered Q-045 four-arm ablation (both-OFF / MECH-313-only / MECH-260-only / both-ON), finally runnable: the survival-competent successor to the 603a-e Q-045 chain that ALL bottomed at substrate-readiness (effective N=1 from seed death, z_goal=0, MECH-260 FIFO non-operative -> Q-045 routed substrate_ceiling 2026-05-27). New number because the 603-series drifted entirely to the SD-059/MECH-358 bridge/harm lineage; same scientific question, substantially new (now survivable) substrate. The full Stage-0/0b/P0/Stage-H/P1 survival-competence config is ported VERBATIM from V3-EXQ-603q (PASS 2026-06-17T04:28:30Z) and held CONSTANT across all 4 arms (scaffolding, not under test): harm-pathway training+stabilization (603k+603q amend), SD-058/MECH-357 IA gate + driver, SD-059/MECH-358 escape bridge, PAG, fed harm stream, nursery + developmental window + 634c seeding calibration + SD-057 cue-recall. The ONLY cross-arm variables are use_noise_floor/noise_floor_alpha (MECH-313) and use_dacc/dacc_suppression_weight=0.5/memory=8 (MECH-260); ARC-062 use_gated_policy enabled on all arms (the Q-045 spec). After the curriculum a FROZEN-POLICY P2 (30 ep x 300 steps, FIFO warmup 30) measures selected-action-class entropy (primary diversity DV) + reef occupancy + z_goal + dACC FIFO diagnostics. claim_ids=[Q-045,MECH-313,MECH-260] -> evidence_direction_per_claim. FOUR pre-registered non-vacuity preconditions self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue / non_contributory, NEVER a false weakens: PRE_REACH (>=2/3 seeds per arm reach P2 with measured_steps>=100 -- the effective-N=1 killer), PRE_ZGOAL (z_goal_norm_peak>0.4 on >=2/3 P2 cells), PRE_MECH260 (dACC FIFO operative on >=2/3 seeds of EACH dACC arm -- guards the 603 call-path-bypass bug), PRE_NONDEGEN (entropy metric non-degenerate via _metrics.check_degeneracy). A genuine `weakens` (fail_no_diversity) is reachable ONLY when all preconditions hold. Evidence grid maps to Q-045's registered outcomes (mutually-load-bearing / 313-dominates / 260-dominates) + the R4 lit-pull DIRECTIONALLY-COUPLED 4th category (Tervo 2014, flags the 8-cell follow-on). experiment_purpose=evidence. Validator --strict OK; dry-run smoke PASS (full pipeline end-to-end, all 4 arms, z_goal forms 0.44-0.53; correctly self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue at dry scale by design -- undertrained toy agent dies before the P2 FIFO warmup so measured_steps=0). Q-045 stays open/substrate_ceiling; MECH-313 candidate_substrate_landed; MECH-260 candidate -- no status change pending the run. Do NOT start the runner (cloud auto-claims).

items.title: SD-034 closure-control-plane de-commit authority re-run on the TRAINED rule_bias_head (commitment_closure:GAP-4 Leg C); non-cap-pinned ON<OFF latch-occupancy-drop DV
items.note: commitment_closure:GAP-4. Supersedes 460d. The Leg-C scaffold_train_rule_bias_head leg (598b REINFORCE in P1) landed 2026-06-16 (ree-v3 3ccc48a) -- 460d set lateral_pfc_train_rule_bias_head=True but never optimized the head, so the rule_state carried no magnitude and the de-commit had no MECH-090 latch authority (460d C2/C4 FAIL). 460e enables the scaffold leg + reads de-commit on a NON-CAP-PINNED ON<OFF beta-latch-occupancy drop (replaces 460d count-based C2 + cap-pinned C4). FOUR readiness gates self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue (never a false weakens): contact / rule_bias_head-trained (mean |bias| > floor -- the direct anti-460d-bug gate) / beta-engagement-both-arms (the 468d commit-without-beta guard) / closure-trigger. PASS -> supports SD-034/MECH-261, MECH-260 supports; readiness-met-criteria-unmet -> genuine weakens (route /failure-autopsy). Smoke: validator --strict OK; dry-run end-to-end self-routes substrate_not_ready (rule_bias leg trained, mean |bias| 0.036). Do NOT start runner (cloud auto-claims).

items.title: SD-037 axis-(b) Phase-1b JOINT-COMPOSITE substrate-readiness falsifier: scaffold-trained policy + 569i-validated conversion config (top-k shortlist + authority gain=2.0 std + e2_world_forward) + MECH-341 + SD-056, z_harm_a dynamic crossings (sharpened C3a/C3b) under the axis-(b) sustained-threat overlay
items.note: sd_037_axis_b:P1b. Resumes the Phase-1b gate now that committed-action diversity is demonstrated (V3-EXQ-569i PASS/supports, ARC-065, 2026-06-16). Replaces 625c's warmup_train base policy (which monostrategy-locked) with a policy trained THROUGH the scaffolded_sd054_onboarding full curriculum (603n config) running under the 569i-validated conversion config (use_modulatory_channel_routing + route_source=cand_world_summary + use_modulatory_selection_authority gain=2.0 normalize_basis=std + use_modulatory_shortlist_then_modulate mode=top_k k=3 + candidate_summary_source=e2_world_forward) + MECH-341 (use_e3_score_diversity stratified+entropy) + SD-056 (e2_action_contrastive trained online on the axis-(b) env). Measures z_harm_a dynamic crossings (sharpened C3a >=1 above->below AND C3b >=1 below->above per seed, >=2/3 seeds, per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-625b Section 8.3) under the SD-029 sustained-threat overlay (scheduled_external_hazard interval=20 prob=0.7 adjacent_only + hazard_harm=0.2 + proximity_harm_scale=0.2) on a dim-matched scaffold p2 env. claim_ids=[] (diagnostic; weights no claim). FOUR pre-registered non-vacuity gates (R1 curriculum-fired 3/3, R2 z_harm_a-nonzero, R3 route_range+cand_world_pairwise_dist > floors, R4 committed-action entropy > floor) self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue on a miss -- NEVER a weakens. PASS clears P1b and makes the P2->P3->P4 chain (V3-EXQ-483f terminal, shared with axis-a) workable. SD-037/MECH-280/MECH-281 stay substrate_ceiling/pending_retest_after_substrate. Dry-run smoke PASS (full pipeline end-to-end; correctly self-routed substrate_not_ready at dry scale).
